title: Day at school
text: I go to school at 8 in the morning. We read books. We sing songs. We play games at lunch time. After school I run home to mom and dad. I love school days!

character_tips.anna: Daily life story. Numbers fit naturally with words.
character_tips.knopych: 🏫 SCHOOL DAY! From morning to home!
character_tips.klavochka: A whole school day, my dear 📚
